faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Hollis typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method used. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Hollis home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Hollis homes take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical treatment. Heat treatments often require only one visit, while chemical treatments may need a follow-up application 10-14 days later to eliminate any newly hatched eggs.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for children and pets in my Hollis home?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Heat treatments use no chemicals at all, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments require only a few hours away from home before it's safe to return. We provide detailed safety instructions for every treatment.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency bed bug services throughout Hollis, Queens. We understand how urgent bed bug problems are and strive to respond quickly. Call us before noon for potential same-day treatment availability, and we'll do everything possible to accommodate your schedule.
